context.description: The current database schema for the article system is functional and supports core features (articles, categories, comments, tags, helpfulness voting, and versioning). However, several improvements are required to ensure data consistency, scalability, and production readiness.

objectives.objective: Ensure data consistency at database level
Align schema with real-world production requirements

requirements.requirement: Add a CHECK constraint to ensure: - publishedAt is NOT NULL when status = 'PUBLISHED' - publishedAt can be NULL otherwise

task.title: Add composite index for article queries

requirements.requirement: Create index on (status, publishedAt DESC) to optimize common queries: WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY publishedAt DESC

task.title: Add partial index for published articles

requirements.requirement: Create a partial index for published articles only: WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED'
Add slug (UNIQUE) for SEO-friendly URLs
Add excerpt for preview content
Add deletedAt for soft delete support
Add user status (ACTIVE, DISABLED, BANNED)
Add lastLoginAt timestamp
Add avatarUrl field (optional)
Add version number field
Add titleSnapshot field
Add deletedAt for soft delete
Ensure threaded comments remain consistent after deletion
Add updatedAt to support vote changes
Add optional path or level fields for faster tree queries
Add usageCount field to Tag table
Create Bookmark table (userId, articleId, createdAt)
Add unique constraint (userId, articleId)
Create AuditLog table with: - userId - action - entityType - entityId - createdAt
Optionally create ArticleView table to track real views (articleId, userId, viewedAt)

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Database enforces consistency rules for published articles
Common queries are optimized with proper indexes
Schema supports soft delete and future features
No breaking changes to existing core functionality

notes.note: Ensure backward compatibility with existing data
